hero_desc: SoulwareAI — AIDAG Chain's own proprietary brain & cell system — governs every on-chain decision. No external AI. No human override. Pure autonomous intelligence building the LSC DAG Chain from within.
features_desc: SoulwareAI is not external software — it is the living intelligence of AIDAG Chain. Modules and agents form a DAG chain loop between AIDAG Token (BSC) and LSC Coin (2027).
f1_desc: AIDAG Chain's own brain & cell system. Produces autonomous modules and agents forming the DAG loop. No external AI. No human override.
f2_desc: Post-quantum cryptography (CRYSTALS-Kyber, Dilithium, SPHINCS+) protects the network against next-generation quantum attacks.
f3_desc: 1 AIDAG = 1 Vote. SoulwareAI evaluates proposals and executes them autonomously on-chain. Community shapes. AI executes.
f4_desc: AIDAG Token on BSC (BEP-20). Ethereum & Polygon bridge cells operational. LSC Coin bridge arriving 2027.
f5_desc: 3,001,000 founder tokens time-locked 1 year — verifiable on BSCScan. No mint function. 21M supply permanently fixed.
f6_desc: SoulwareAI autonomously builds LSC DAG Chain. Target: 100,000+ TPS. Quantum-resistant consensus. AIDAG ↔ LSC bridge.
lsc_desc: SoulwareAI builds LSC Chain block-by-block. DAG architecture targets 100,000+ TPS. AIDAG holders receive priority LSC coin allocation at mainnet launch.
presale_subtitle: Stage 1 — Limited allocation. Price increases each stage.
faq1_a: AIDAG is a BEP-20 token on BSC and the foundation of the entire AIDAG ecosystem. SoulwareAI — the chain's own brain — governs all operations autonomously.
faq2_a: SoulwareAI is AIDAG Chain's proprietary brain and cell system. It is NOT OpenAI, NOT GPT-4, NOT any external AI company. It is the autonomous intelligence built into AIDAG Chain itself — producing modules and agents forming the DAG loop.
faq3_a: 0xe6B06f7C63F6AC84729007ae8910010F6E721041 on BSC. Verified on BSCScan. No mint. Immutable.
faq4_a: 1 AIDAG = 1 Vote. Holders create proposals. SoulwareAI evaluates and autonomously executes approved proposals on-chain.
faq5_a: Stage 1: $0.078. Stage 2: $0.098. Exchange listing: $0.12. Early participants get the best entry price.
faq6_a: LSC Chain is the 2027 DAG blockchain autonomously built by SoulwareAI. Target: 100,000+ TPS, quantum-resistant consensus. AIDAG holders receive priority LSC coin allocation.
cta_desc: AIDAG Token (BSC) + LSC Coin (DAG 2027) = One autonomous ecosystem governed by SoulwareAI, the chain's own intelligence.
footer_tagline: The world's first fully autonomous chain ecosystem. SoulwareAI builds. Community governs.
